str.authority: Anti-Money Laundering Division / Investigation Bureau, Ministry of Justice
str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed within 2 business days of forming suspicion. VASPs registered with FSC are reporting entities under the Money Laundering Control Act. Terrorism financing reports must be filed immediately.

ctr.authority: Anti-Money Laundering Division / Investigation Bureau, Ministry of Justice
ctr.notes: Currency Transaction Reports required for cash transactions of TWD 500,000 or more (approximately USD 15,500). Must be filed within 5 business days.
